en: Thus says the LORD: "Go down to the house of the king of Judah and speak there this word,
zh: 耶和華這樣說：“你下到猶大王的宮中，在那裡宣講這些話，

en: and say, 'Hear the word of the LORD, O King of Judah, who sits on the throne of David, you, and your servants, and your people who enter these gates.
zh: 說：‘坐大衛王位的猶大王啊！你和你的臣僕，以及從這些門進來的人民，都要聽耶和華的話。

en: Thus says the LORD: Do justice and righteousness, and deliver from the hand of the oppressor him who has been robbed. And do no wrong or violence to the resident alien, the fatherless, and the widow, nor shed innocent blood in this place.
zh: 耶和華這樣說：你們要施行公正和公義，解救被搶奪的脫離欺壓者的手，不可虐待或以強暴對待寄居的、孤兒和寡婦，也不可在這地方流無辜人的血。

en: For if you will indeed obey this word, then there shall enter the gates of this house kings who sit on the throne of David, riding in chariots and on horses, they and their servants and their people.
zh: 如果你們切實地行這些事，就必有坐大衛王位的列王，乘著車，騎著馬，與自己的臣僕和人民進入這王宮的各門。

en: But if you will not obey these words, I swear by myself, declares the LORD, that this house shall become a desolation.
zh: 如果你們不聽從這些話，我指著自己起誓，這宮殿必變為廢墟。’”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: For thus says the LORD concerning the house of the king of Judah: "' You are like Gilead to me, like the summit of Lebanon, yet surely I will make you a desert, an uninhabited city.
zh: 因為耶和華論到猶大王的宮殿這樣說： “雖然在我看來，你好像基列， 好像黎巴嫩的山峰； 我卻要使你變為曠野， 變為無人居住的城市。

en: I will prepare destroyers against you, each with his weapons, and they shall cut down your choicest cedars and cast them into the fire.
zh: 我要指派毀滅者， 各有兵器攻擊你； 他們必砍下你最好的香柏樹， 丟進火裡。

en: "'And many nations will pass by this city, and every man will say to his neighbor, "Why has the LORD dealt thus with this great city?"
zh: 多國的人必經過這城，彼此發問：‘耶和華為甚麼這樣對待這大城呢？’

en: And they will answer, "Because they have forsaken the covenant of the LORD their God and worshiped other gods and served them."'"
zh: 必有人說：‘是因為他們離棄了耶和華他們 神的約，並且敬拜事奉別神。’”

en: Weep not for him who is dead, nor grieve for him, but weep bitterly for him who goes away, for he shall return no more to see his native land.
zh: 不要為那已死的人哀哭， 不要為他悲傷； 卻要為那遠去的人大大哀哭， 因為他不得再回來， 也不能再見自己的國土。

en: For thus says the LORD concerning Shallum the son of Josiah, king of Judah, who reigned instead of Josiah his father, and who went away from this place: "He shall return here no more,
zh: 因為論到猶大王約西亞的兒子，就是繼承他父親約西亞作王的沙龍，耶和華這樣說：“他離開了這地方，必不得再回來；

en: but in the place where they have carried him captive, there shall he die, and he shall never see this land again."
zh: 因為他要死在被擄去的地方，不得再見這地。

en: "Woe to him who builds his house by unrighteousness, and his upper rooms by injustice, who makes his neighbor serve him for nothing and does not give him his wages,
zh: “用不義的手段建造自己房屋、 用不公正的方法建築自己樓房的， 有禍了！ 他使自己的同胞白白作工， 不把工資付給他們。

en: who says, 'I will build myself a great house with spacious upper rooms,' who cuts out windows for it, paneling it with cedar and painting it with vermilion.
zh: 他說：‘我要為自己建造宏偉的房屋、 寬敞的樓房。’ 他又為房屋裝設寬闊的窗戶， 用香柏木作鑲板， 並且漆上紅色。

en: Do you think you are a king because you compete in cedar? Did not your father eat and drink and do justice and righteousness? Then it was well with him.
zh: 難道你是用香柏木爭勝來表明王的身分嗎？ 你父親不是也吃也喝， 也施行公正和公義嗎？ 那時他得享福樂。

en: He judged the cause of the poor and needy; then it was well. Is not this to know me? declares the LORD.
zh: 他為困苦和貧窮人伸冤， 那時他得享福樂。 這不是認識我的真義嗎？” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: But you have eyes and heart only for your dishonest gain, for shedding innocent blood, and for practicing oppression and violence."
zh: “但你的眼你的心甚麼都不顧， 只顧你的不義之財， 只知流無辜人的血， 施行欺壓和迫害的事。”

en: Therefore thus says the LORD concerning Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah: "They shall not lament for him, saying, 'Ah, my brother!' or 'Ah, sister!' They shall not lament for him, saying, 'Ah, lord!' or 'Ah, his majesty!'
zh: 因此，論到猶大王約西亞的兒子約雅敬，耶和華這樣說： “人必不為他哀傷，說： ‘哀哉，我哥哥！’‘哀哉，我姊姊！’ 人必不為他哀傷，說： ‘哀哉，主上！’‘哀哉，尊榮的王！’

en: With the burial of a donkey he shall be buried, dragged and dumped beyond the gates of Jerusalem."
zh: 他像驢子一樣被埋葬， 被拖走，拋在耶路撒冷城門外。”

en: "Go up to Lebanon, and cry out, and lift up your voice in Bashan; cry out from Abarim, for all your lovers are destroyed.
zh: “耶路撒冷啊，上黎巴嫩哀叫吧！ 在巴珊揚聲吧！ 從亞巴琳哀叫吧！ 因為你的盟友都毀滅了。

en: I spoke to you in your prosperity, but you said, 'I will not listen.' This has been your way from your youth, that you have not obeyed my voice.
zh: 你安定的時候，我曾警告過你， 你卻說：‘我不聽！’ 從你幼年以來，你就是這樣， 不聽從我的話。

en: The wind shall shepherd all your shepherds, and your lovers shall go into captivity; then you will be ashamed and confounded because of all your evil.
zh: 風要捲走你所有的牧人， 你的盟友要被擄去； 那時，因你的一切惡行， 你必蒙羞受辱。

en: O inhabitant of Lebanon, nested among the cedars, how you will be pitied when pangs come upon you, pain as of a woman in labor!"
zh: 住在黎巴嫩，在香柏林中搭窩的啊！ 有痛苦臨到你，像產婦劇痛的時候， 你要怎樣呻吟呢？”

en: "As I live, declares the LORD, though Coniah the son of Jehoiakim, king of Judah, were the signet ring on my right hand, yet I would tear you off
zh: “我指著我的永生起誓 ，猶大王約雅敬的兒子哥尼雅，雖然你是我右手上的印戒，我也要把你從手上脫下來，

en: and give you into the hand of those who seek your life, into the hand of those of whom you are afraid, even into the hand of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon and into the hand of the Chaldeans.
zh: 交在那些尋索你性命和你們懼怕的人手中，就是交在巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒和迦勒底人手中。

en: I will hurl you and the mother who bore you into another country, where you were not born, and there you shall die.
zh: 我要把你和生你的母親驅趕到異地去，你們不是生在那裡，卻要死在那裡。

en: But to the land to which they will long to return, there they shall not return."
zh: 你們 渴望歸回本國，卻不得回去。”

en: Is this man Coniah a despised, broken pot, a vessel no one cares for? Why are he and his children hurled and cast into a land that they do not know?
zh: 哥尼雅這個人是被鄙視、 被摔碎的瓶子， 是沒有人喜悅的器皿嗎？ 他和他的後裔為甚麼被驅趕， 被拋棄到他們不認識的地去呢？

en: O land, land, land, hear the word of the LORD!
zh: 大地啊！大地啊！大地啊！ 要聽耶和華的話。

en: Thus says the LORD: "Write this man down as childless, a man who shall not succeed in his days, for none of his offspring shall succeed in sitting on the throne of David and ruling again in Judah."
zh: 耶和華這樣說： “你們要寫下，這人算為無子， 他的一生毫無成就； 因為他的後裔中沒有一人可以成功， 能坐在大衛的王位上， 再次統治猶大。”
